title: VillagerRepopulation
description: Makes villagers spawn naturally over time in villages. You can get them back now!
body:
**DM ME ON DC [USER-WolfJTA] IF YOU WANT ME TO UPDATE THIS PLUGIN WITH A FEATURE YOU WANT OR TO HAVE ME MAKE A PLUGIN FOR YOU (FREEE)**

**DC USER IS WOLFJTA FOR BUGS/HELP**

Straightforward plugin which enables villager spawning over time. Makes it so villagers arent a one time thing, and more acsessible to your normal joe.
Scans to spawn at villages (checks for jobsites and beds) every x minutes, x radius, and with an x percent chance of spawning if conditions are met.
I say x because you can configure **everything!**

enjoy!
